phrases.intent_en: Ask where the salt flats are
phrases.cultural_note: Salt flats are a stable landmark; signs or staff guidance are typical.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if sunbeds are available now
phrases.cultural_note: Availability fluctuates with demand; staff will confirm current status.
Umbrella rental is a common beach service but exact stand placement is not specified.

likely_response.local: Δεξιά μετά τις ξαπλώστρες, στο κιόσκι.
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the beach, near the sunbeds, is the rental point.

responses.english: At the end of the beach, near the sunbeds, is the rental point.
responses.local: Δεξιά μετά τις ξαπλώστρες, στο κιόσκι.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to pay for sunbed rental
phrases.cultural_note: Beach rentals typically accept both cash and card unless specified otherwise.
Parking fees are common in tourist beach areas but may not be explicitly advertised without asking.

likely_response.local: Ναι, στο πάρκινγκ της παραλίας Τιγκάκι.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there is a fee at the beach parking lot. Spots fill up quickly by midday, so it's best to come early.

responses.english: Yes, there is a fee at the beach parking lot. Spots fill up quickly by midday, so it's best to come early.
responses.local: Ναι, στο πάρκινγκ της παραλίας Τιγκάκι.

phrases.cultural_note: Changing cabins are common in beach areas but exact placement is not specified.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there are changing rooms next to the sandy beach, near the sunbeds.

responses.english: Yes, there are changing rooms next to the sandy beach, near the sunbeds.

phrases.text_local: Πού μπορώ να νοικιάσω ομπρέλα στην παραλία;
phrases.cultural_note: Staff may point to a general area or a designated rental stand without specifying exact placement.

likely_response.translation_en: There, further down the beach, you will see the umbrella rental spot.

responses.english: There, further down the beach, you will see the umbrella rental spot.
